headline: Salesforce VA Rollout Puts Agentic AI At Core Of Healthcare Operations
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) is extending its Agentic AI platform to the Veterans Health Administration, covering incident response and care coordination across more than 150 VA facilities. The deployment creates a unified operating system intended to connect staff, systems, and data across one of the largest healthcare networks in the U.S. This move marks Salesforce's first large scale use of Agentic AI in U.S. healthcare and expands its presence in the public sector. For investors, this VA...
